title: JSON schema for ES6 Import Sorter

sourcePrefixes.description: The prefixes of your source imports. Ex: import sth from '@data' => '@' can considered as a sourcePrefix

sectionPrefix.description: The prefix of your section title

sectionNames.description: The names (which comes right after 'sectionPrefix') of your section title

startImportBlockSign.description: The sign to mark the start of import block. Default is '' - the start of the file

endImportBlockSign.description: The sign to mark the end of import block. Default is '' - the first empty line

statementTerminator.description: The sign to mark the end of an import statement. Default is ';'

preCommands.description: The command list run before sorting

oneOf.description: Define command with vscode command option

command.description: the command you need to execute before sorting. It can be terminal command or vscode command

system.description: Define the system will execute the command

oneOf.description: Command will be executed as vscode command
Command will be executed as terminal command
